import io

fn lookup(_ key: String) -> Option<Int>
  if key == "one"
    Some(1)
  else if key == "two"
    Some(2)
  else if key == "three"
    Some(3)
  else
    None
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

match lookup(line)
when Some(n)
  print("value=#{n}")
when None
  print("missing")
end
